title: CAAIL: Cellular Agriculture AI Library
description: A curated, markdown-only resource library at the intersection of Cellular Agriculture and AI — peer-reviewed papers organized as a method × research-area matrix, open-source software, datasets, research-area deep dives, and educational resources for the cell-ag and AI/ML communities.
